name: specx-codex-plugin
description: Universal spec-driven agent governance and execution contract runtime for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Spec-driven execution contracts and governance for Codex workflows.
interface.longDescription: SpecX provides universal execution contracts, gates, evidence requirements, artifact expectations, failure semantics, and verification rules for governed Codex workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use SpecX to compile this task into a governed execution contract.
Use SpecX to verify whether this workflow has agents, tools, evidence, gates, artifacts, and failure semantics.
Use SpecX to explain the execution contract before workflow execution.
